episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 393: Early Wilds of Eldraine Price Trends
episode.description: James & Cliff walk you through all the latest MTGFinance news including the weekly Meta Analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and explore early price trends on Wilds of Eldraine cards.
